name: gemini.models.generate_content
description: Gemini with function calling. Shape grounded in a real `gemini-flash-latest` capture (2026-05-19). The `function_call` part includes the SDK-assigned `id` (used by Gemini to bind the next-turn function_response). Args is a dict, NOT a JSON-encoded string (unlike OpenAI). Every part carries `thought_signature` in v1beta — required when echoing the function_call back in the next turn or the API rejects the call. Renderer treats this visually like OpenAI's tool_call.

parts.text: What's the weather in Tokyo right now?

function_declarations.name: get_weather
function_declarations.description: Get the current weather for a city.
